title: Sheepdog Mini Wooden Puzzles - My First Puzzles, Jigsaw Puzzle Games with Sea life Animal-Educational Toys For 18months Old + Toddler, Montessori Early Development & Activity Toys by Orange Tree Toys
features: DEVELOP KEY MOTOR SKILLS: Make friends with this beautifully crafted traditional mini wooden puzzle featuring a cute sheep dog, part of our Farmyard range. The perfect size for little hands, and with pieces chunky enough for little hands to grab, they can be pulled apart and reassembled easily to stimulate their fine motor skills

SAFE FOR PLAY: Painted with non-toxic paint, this wooden puzzle will help support children with colour and shape recognition. All Orange Tree toys and puzzle games are tested both in-house during production and independently to meet European safety standards. Suitable from age 18 months

PROMOTES DEVELOPMENT: Wooden puzzles are a great way to make learning fun and the bright colours and cute face expression of this sheepdog help stimulate their visual development. These jigsaw puzzles for kids of all ages are an amazing way to help your child develop their dexterity and hand-eye co-ordination through play

TRUSTED MANAFACTURER: Designed in the UK by Orange Tree Toys, in their headquarters in the Cotswold countryside. Orange Tree toys are environmentally friendly; made from FSC certified sustainable wood and 100% recyclable packaging. Wooden toys are durable and long lasting; they can be passed down the generations!

PERFECT GIFT: With their box perfect for gifting, jigsaw puzzles for kids and animal toys are ideal birthday gifts for girls and boys, Christmas presents, Christening gifts or for another special occasion. They also make wonderful educational toys for 3 year olds and help consolidate their dexterity, problem solving and fine motor skills before starting preschool or infant school
description: From the manufacturer Traditional Wooden Toys Our beautiful wooden toys are all lovingly designed in the UK. Our toys are designed for maximum fun and safety, proving a range a beautifully crafted traditional children's toys which last for years are are sure to become toy box treasures. Designed for Maximum Fun & safety All Orange Tree toys are tested both in-house during production and independently to meet European safety standards. All of our toys are painted using non-toxic paint. Licensed Toys As well as our own bright and colourful range of toys, we are also proud to hold the license for some truly traditional childhood favourites! We offer a beautiful range of products for Peter Rabbit, Winnie the Pooh and Paddington Bear.
